gate_question: Is the disease definition, population/subtype scope, and geography correct before we spend downstream compute?
human_input_that_resolves_it: User confirms or edits scope (e.g. adult vs pediatric, specific subtype, US vs global)
go_criteria: Scope confirmed and recorded in dossier

gate_question: What is the disease archetype (genetic architecture), mechanism of pathogenesis (if monogenic), and data density? This reshapes Stages 3/4/5/8/9.
human_input_that_resolves_it: User confirms/corrects the proposed archetype + mechanism (grounded in ClinGen validity, gnomAD constraint, ClinVar, OMIM/Orphanet); mechanism is a clinical claim needing validation
go_criteria: Archetype + data_density set; mechanism confirmed or flagged as open question
nogo_action: Re-classify with user-supplied genetics; if mechanism truly unknown, run Stage 4 to confirm before modality selection

gate_question: Are these the top patient priorities, correctly ranked?
human_input_that_resolves_it: User confirms/re-ranks the priority list that becomes design requirements
nogo_action: Re-weight from patient-org input the user supplies

gate_question: Which competitive whitespace (data-rich) OR analogous-modality precedent (sparse/ultra-rare) should we pursue?
human_input_that_resolves_it: User picks the strategic opening; for sparse indications, confirms the natural-history + analogous-precedent framing instead of a competitor matrix
go_criteria: A defensible opening selected (whitespace or precedent-anchored)

gate_question: Is there enough data (omics/trials/natural-history) to proceed, or should we pivot the approach?
human_input_that_resolves_it: User confirms proceeding on genetics-led evidence when omics/trials are absent, or supplies additional data sources
go_criteria: Data path chosen (rich meta-analysis vs genetics-led); gaps recorded
nogo_action: Kill-or-pivot before design spend; consider natural-history study as a prerequisite

gate_question: Is the target/mechanism evidence strong enough to design against (omics concordance when rich; genetic causality when sparse)?
human_input_that_resolves_it: User accepts the target/mechanism or asks to widen datasets/relax thresholds
go_criteria: Data-rich: >=1 target with concordant omics+lit+druggability. Sparse: causal gene with ClinGen validity + ClinVar/gnomAD support

gate_question: Which target(s) and which therapeutic modality do we commit to? (Common: protein-biology router. Genetic: mechanism->modality tree.)
human_input_that_resolves_it: User confirms or overrides the scored rubric / mechanism-tree recommendation
go_criteria: Lead target(s) + modality confirmed by user; for genetic, mechanism-appropriate modality + delivery vehicle named
nogo_action: Re-score with user-supplied weights; do not proceed to design

gate_question: Do the validated leads clear quality thresholds (interface metrics for binders; on/off-target + delivery feasibility for genetic modalities)?
human_input_that_resolves_it: User approves leads or requests redesign/optimization loop
go_criteria: Lead(s) meet modality-appropriate thresholds with acceptable caveats
nogo_action: Return to Stage 5 (re-pick) or iterate Stage 6 optimization; cap loops

gate_question: Are the designation + pathway assumptions sound? (Common: orphan/FT/BTD/RMAT. Rare/genetic: + RPD PRV, accelerated approval on surrogate, natural-history external control, platform IND, N-of-1 ASO path.)
human_input_that_resolves_it: User confirms regulatory framing and primary endpoints

gate_question: Are the round sizes, pricing, and model acceptable? (Common: TAM/SAM/SOM chronic dosing. Ultra-rare: tiny-N, one-time/curative pricing, value-based annuity, registry launch.)
human_input_that_resolves_it: User confirms or edits financial assumptions and the Ask

gate_question: Does the full deliverable package pass multi-perspective review and is it ready to ship?
human_input_that_resolves_it: User signs off or requests revisions after seeing peer-review risk matrix
nogo_action: Loop back to the specific stage owning each blocker

gate_question: Claude Science is uncertain or a claim needs clinical/human validation
human_input_that_resolves_it: User validates the specific claim or supplies missing data/judgment
nogo_action: Record as open question in dossier; do not assert as fact
